revision.text:
'''己丑'''（つちのとうし、きちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて26番目で、前は[[戊子]]、次は[[庚寅]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は土、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#比和|比和]]である。
==己丑の年==
==己丑の日== ===[[選日]]=== 己丑の日は[[十方暮]]の6日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''己丑'''（つちのとうし、きどのうし、きちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの26番目で、前は[[戊子]]、次は[[庚寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[己]]は陰の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==己丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って29が余る年が己丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[29年]] *[[89年]] *[[149年]] *[[209年]] *[[269年]] *[[329年]] *[[389年]] *[[449年]] *[[509年]] *[[569年]] *[[629年]] *[[689年]] *[[749年]] *[[809年]] *[[869年]] *[[929年]] *[[989年]] | *[[1049年]] *[[1109年]] *[[1169年]] *[[1229年]] *[[1289年]] *[[1349年]] *[[1409年]] *[[1469年]] *[[1529年]] *[[1589年]] *[[1649年]] *[[1709年]] *[[1769年]] *[[1829年]] *[[1889年]] *[[1949年]] | *[[2009年]] *[[2069年]] *[[2129年]] *[[2189年]] *[[2249年]] *[[2309年]] *[[2369年]] *[[2429年]] *[[2489年]] *[[2549年]] *[[2609年]] *[[2669年]] *[[2729年]] *[[2789年]] *[[2849年]] *[[2909年]] *[[2969年]] |}
==己丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[12月]]が己丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己丑の日== 己丑の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己丑の日は[[十方暮]]の6日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:己丑]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:己丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:己丑]]

revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle}} '''Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|戊子}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|庚寅}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and the Five Elements]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己}} represents yin [[earth]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑}} also represents yin [[earth]], making this a [[Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
== Years of Jichou == A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
== Jichou Months == In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[Beginning of Spring]]).
== Jichou Days == A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮).
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} * {{ill|Chinese calendar|ja|中国暦}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Jichou]] [[ja:己丑]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|戊子}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|庚寅}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and the Five Elements]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己}} represents yin [[earth]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑}} also represents yin [[earth]], making this a [[Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
== Years of Jichou == A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
== Jichou Months == In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[Beginning of Spring]]).
== Jichou Days == A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮).
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Chinese calendar|ja|中国暦}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Jichou]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Earth Ox]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[ja:己丑]]

It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|戊子}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|庚寅}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and the Five Elements]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己}} represents yin [[earth]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑}} also represents yin [[earth]], making this a [[Five Elements|harmonious combination]].

This is determined based on the [[Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[Beginning of Spring]]).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|庚}}" to "|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|戊子}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|庚寅}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and the Five Elements]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} represents yin [[earth]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑}} also represents yin [[earth]], making this a [[Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
== Years of Jichou == A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
== Jichou Months == In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[Beginning of Spring]]).
== Jichou Days == A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮).
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Chinese calendar|ja|中国暦}}

== Jichou Days == A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮).
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Chinese calendar|ja|中国暦}}

It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|戊子}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|庚寅}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} represents yin [[earth]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)}} also represents yin [[earth]], making this a [[Five Elements|harmonious combination]].

[[3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
== Jichou Months == In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[Beginning of Spring]]).
== Jichou Days == A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Chinese calendar|ja|中国暦}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|戊子|12=draft}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|庚寅|12=draft}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=draft}} represents yin [[earth]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=draft}} also represents yin [[earth]], making this a [[Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
== Years of Jichou == A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
== Jichou Months == In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=draft}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=draft}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[Beginning of Spring]]).
== Jichou Days == A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=draft}} * {{ill|Chinese calendar|ja|中国暦|12=draft}}

It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|戊子|12=draft|12=draft}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|庚寅|12=draft|12=draft}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=draft|12=draft}} represents yin [[earth]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=draft|12=draft}} also represents yin [[earth]], making this a [[Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
== Years of Jichou == A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
== Jichou Months == In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=draft|12=draft}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[Beginning of Spring]]).
== Jichou Days == A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Chinese calendar|ja|中国暦|12=draft|12=draft}}
[[cdo:Kí-cṳ̄de]][[nds:Erd-Büffelvi]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]][[zh-yue:己丑]] {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category: 5]] [[Category:Jichou]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Yin Earth Ox]] [[ja:己丑]] [[zh:己丑]] [[ko:기축]] [[fr:Buffle de terre]] [[de:Erde-Büffel]] [[en:Yin Earth Ox]] [[af:Aardeos (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Büffelen]] [[en:Earth Ox]] [[fr:Buffle de terreboishak]] [[it:Ki-chṳ́id]] [[sn:ichinja]] [[vi:Kỷ Sửu]] [[za:Keiceij]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|qq=}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[earth]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=Ox (Zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=}} also represents yin [[earth]], making this a [[Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== PronounciationYin Earth Ox
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]] [[zh-yue:己丑]]
{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Earth Ox|qq=ja|己丑|version=85986875|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]]
}}
[[cdo:Kí-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Büffelvi]] [[de:Yin Earth Ox]] [[sn:Yin Earth Ox]] [[ja:己丑]] [[zh:己丑]] [[ko:기축]] [[fr:Buffle de terre]] [[de:Erde-Büffel]] [[en:Yin Earth Ox]] [[af:Aardeos (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Büffelen]] [[en:Earth Ox]] [[fr:Buffle de terreboishak]] [[it:Ki-chṳ́id]] [[sn:ichinja]] [[vi:Kỷ Sửu]] [[za:Keiceij]] [[ar:Yin Earth Ox]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|qq=}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[earth]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=Ox (Zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=}} also represents yin [[earth]], making this a [[Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Earth Ox|qq=ja|己丑|version=85986875|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[earth]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=Ox (Zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=}} also represents yin [[earth]], making this a [[Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]] [[zh-yue:己丑]]
{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Earth Ox|qq=ja|己丑|version=85986875|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]]
}}

[[af:Aardeos (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Büffelen]] [[en:Earth Ox]] [[fr:Buffle de terreboishak]] [[it:Ki-chṳ́id]] [[sn:ichinja]] [[vi:Kỷ Sửu]] [[za:Keiceij]] [[ar:Yin Earth Ox]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=Ox (Zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Earth Ox|qq=ja|己丑|version=85986875|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]]
}}

This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=Ox (Zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[solar term]] system (from [[Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061992]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=Ox (Zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061992]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh_min_nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh_yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061992]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]] [[zh-yue:己丑]]

}}

According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu

[[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}

This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).

=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}

This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061992]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061992]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu

--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).

[[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}

[[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061992]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|Q1}}" to ""
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061992]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]
