<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061992]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu

--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}

This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).

It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh_min_nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh_yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh_min_nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh_yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061992]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]] [[zh-yue:己丑]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh_yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh_yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061992]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin [[:en:Earth|Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]] [[zh-yue:己丑]]
{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Earth Ox|qq=ja|己丑|version=85986875|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: v25: Convert interwiki links [[:en:...]] to {{ill}} templates
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061992]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|en|Earth|WD=Q2|lt=Earth}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch}} {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin {{ill|Earth|en|Earth|WD=Q2|lt=Earth}}, making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium}} |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Chinese calendar|en|Chinese calendar|WD=Q134032|lt=Chinese calendar}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Earth Ox|qq=ja|己丑|version=85986875|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]]
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|en|Earth|WD=Q2|lt=Earth}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch}} {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu (丑)|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin {{ill|Earth|en|Earth|WD=Q2|lt=Earth}}, making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium}} |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Chinese calendar|en|Chinese calendar|WD=Q134032|lt=Chinese calendar}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]]
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Ox|kanji=己丑|romaji=tsuchinoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=jǐchǒu|w=chi-ch'ou|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gei2 chau2|j=gei2 chau2|ci=kei tsʰɐu̯|mc=kɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kɯʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by {{ill|Wuzi (戊子)|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuzi (戊子)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gengyin (庚寅)|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengyin (庚寅)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ji (己)|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji (己)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|en|Earth|WD=Q2|lt=Earth|1=Earth}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Chou (丑)|ja|丑|1=chǒu|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou (丑)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} also represents yin {{ill|Earth|en|Earth|WD=Q2|lt=Earth|1=Earth}}, making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Ox (己丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうし (tsuchinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gichuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Ox== A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Jichou''' |- ! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium|1=3rd millennium}} |- | * 29 * 89 * 149 * 209 * 269 * 329 * 389 * 449 * 509 * 569 * 629 * 689 * 749 * 809 * 869 * 929 * 989 | * 1049 * 1109 * 1169 * 1229 * 1289 * 1349 * 1409 * 1469 * 1529 * 1589 * 1649 * 1709 * 1769 * 1829 * 1889 * 1949 | * 2009 * 2069 * 2129 * 2189 * 2249 * 2309 * 2369 * 2429 * 2489 * 2549 * 2609 * 2669 * 2729 * 2789 * 2849 * 2909 * 2969 |}
==Months of Yin Earth Ox== In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Geng (庚)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (庚)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi (乙)|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi (乙)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Ox== A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.
=== Special Characteristics === Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮). == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Chinese calendar|en|Chinese calendar|WD=Q134032|lt=Chinese calendar|1=Chinese calendar}}
